extracted_claim.claim_summary: The customer is claiming a crack on the outer body of a laptop.

image_assessments.notes: The image shows a smartphone with a severely shattered screen, not a laptop body.

result.user_claim: Customer: I need help with a laptop body crack claim. | Support: Which part is cracked? | Customer: The outer body near the side edge. | Support: Screen, keyboard, or body? | Customer: Body only.
result.evidence_standard_met_reason: No image shows the claimed body; the claimed part cannot be assessed.
result.claim_status_justification: Image evidence is insufficient to evaluate the claim. No image shows the claimed body; the claimed part cannot be assessed.
